description: Complete implementation tasks for the Canvas Control Plane monorepo. Each task must be completed cleanly before moving to the next. References are to plan.md line numbers.

tasks.title: Initialize Monorepo Structure
tasks.description: Create root package.json with workspaces (apps/*, packages/*). Choose pnpm or npm. Create empty directories: apps/api, apps/web, packages/agent, packages/shared.

tasks.title: Initialize API App (Fastify)
tasks.description: Set up apps/api with TypeScript, tsconfig.json, Fastify v4, build script, and dev script (tsx or nodemon).

tasks.title: Initialize Web App (Next.js)
tasks.description: Set up apps/web with Next.js 14, App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui init.

tasks.title: Initialize Agent Package
tasks.description: Set up packages/agent with TypeScript, ws library, build script. This is a Node.js executable, not a web app.

tasks.title: Dev Infrastructure: Postgres + Caddy
tasks.description: Create docker-compose.dev.yml with Postgres 15. Configure local Caddy (optional) or use Fastify directly on port 3001 for dev.

tasks.title: Setup Drizzle ORM
tasks.description: Install Drizzle ORM and Drizzle Kit in apps/api. Create db/ directory with connection config and schema file.

tasks.title: Define vm_agents Table
tasks.description: Implement Drizzle schema for vm_agents (id, name, api_key_hash, api_key_prefix, status, last_seen_at, etc.).

tasks.title: Define vm_commands Table
tasks.description: Implement Drizzle schema for vm_commands (id, agent_id, command, status, output, timestamps).

tasks.title: Define vm_metrics Table
tasks.description: Implement Drizzle schema for vm_metrics (id, agent_id, sampled_at, cpu_percent, memory_percent, etc.).

tasks.title: Define vm_alerts Table
tasks.description: Implement Drizzle schema for vm_alerts (id, agent_id, type, severity, message, metadata, resolved_at).

tasks.title: Run Initial Migration
tasks.description: Generate and run first Drizzle migration against local dev Postgres. Verify tables exist.

tasks.title: Fastify Server Bootstrap
tasks.description: Create server.ts with Fastify instance, CORS plugin, global error handler. Add health check route GET /health.

tasks.title: Rate Limiting Middleware
tasks.description: Integrate rate-limiter-flexible (in-memory) for general API and specific endpoints (auth, exec).

tasks.title: JWT Utilities
tasks.description: Create lib/jwt.ts with sign and verify functions using SHARED_SECRET (256-bit from ENV).

tasks.title: Auth Exchange Endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /auth/exchange. This endpoint verifies the incoming Better Auth session and returns a short-lived JWT (1h).

tasks.title: JWT Auth Middleware
tasks.description: Create Fastify preHandler hook that validates Bearer JWT on all /v1/* routes. Returns 401 if missing or invalid.

tasks.title: POST /v1/vms (Register)
tasks.description: Create endpoint to register a new VM. Generate unique API key (plain text once, bcrypt hash stored). Return key to admin.

tasks.title: GET /v1/vms (List)
tasks.description: Return all VMs with current status. Join with latest heartbeat data from in-memory state or DB.

tasks.title: GET /v1/vms/:id (Details)
tasks.description: Return single VM details plus last 10 commands from vm_commands.

tasks.title: DELETE /v1/vms/:id (Deregister)
tasks.description: Soft or hard delete VM. Revoke API key. If agent is online, close WebSocket.

tasks.title: POST /v1/vms/:id/revoke-key
tasks.description: Generate new API key, update hash in DB, disconnect current agent.

tasks.title: Setup @fastify/websocket
tasks.description: Register WebSocket plugin in Fastify for route-level WS handling.

tasks.title: Agent WS Route /agent
tasks.description: Create WS route at /agent. Handle connection query param `key`.

tasks.title: Agent Authentication
tasks.description: Verify API key from query param against bcrypt hash in vm_agents. Reject connection if invalid. Map agentId to socket.

tasks.title: Heartbeat Handler
tasks.description: Process `type: 'heartbeat'` messages. Update vm_agents status, dockerStatus, canvasVersion, last_seen_at in DB.

tasks.title: Metrics Handler
tasks.description: Process `type: 'metrics'` messages. Insert new row into vm_metrics table.

tasks.title: Alert Handler
tasks.description: Process `type: 'alert'` messages (OOM, etc.). Insert into vm_alerts. Broadcast to subscribed admins.

tasks.title: Command Dispatcher
tasks.description: Listen for queued commands in vm_commands. If agent is online, send `type: 'exec'` message over agent socket.

tasks.title: Output Stream Handler
tasks.description: Process `type: 'output'` messages from agent. Update vm_commands output field. Forward chunks to subscribed admin browsers.

tasks.title: Admin WS Route /ws
tasks.description: Create WS route at /ws for browsers. Validate JWT from query param `token`.

tasks.title: Subscribe/Unsubscribe Handler
tasks.description: Handle `type: 'subscribe'` and `type: 'unsubscribe'` messages from browser. Update in-memory subscriptions map.

tasks.title: Broadcast Service
tasks.description: Implement helper to send messages to all admin sockets subscribed to a specific vmId.

tasks.title: Initial State Push
tasks.description: When admin subscribes to a VM, immediately push current status, latest metrics, and active alerts.

tasks.title: POST /v1/vms/:id/exec
tasks.description: Create endpoint that queues a command. Insert into vm_commands with status='queued'. Return { cmdId } immediately.

tasks.title: Command Queue Service
tasks.description: In-memory service that checks for queued commands and dispatches them to online agents. Handles offline agents (wait or timeout).

tasks.title: Command Finalizer
tasks.description: When agent sends done=true, update vm_commands with exitCode, status='done' or 'failed', completed_at. Notify admins.

tasks.title: Better Auth Setup
tasks.description: Configure Better Auth in apps/web with email/password. Connect to the same Postgres DB used by the API (or a separate one if preferred).

tasks.title: Login Page / Dashboard Layout
tasks.description: Implement /login with Better Auth. Create dashboard shell with navigation (sidebar or top bar).

tasks.title: VM List Page
tasks.description: Page /dashboard showing grid/table of all VMs. Fetch from GET /v1/vms. Show status badges.

tasks.title: VM Detail Page
tasks.description: Page /dashboard/vms/[id]. Contains: live metrics, command history, alerts, terminal panel.

tasks.title: Live Metrics Component
tasks.description: Display gauges/charts for CPU, RAM, Disk, Docker stats. Updates via WebSocket every 30s.

tasks.title: Terminal / Log Panel
tasks.description: Scrollable terminal showing live logs and command output. Connects to admin WS and subscribes to VM.

tasks.title: Command Runner
tasks.description: UI to send commands: dropdown with presets (restart, update) + custom input. Calls POST /v1/vms/:id/exec.

tasks.title: Alert Panel
tasks.description: Show active alerts from GET /v1/vms/:id/alerts. Color-coded by severity. OOM alerts linked to detail page.

tasks.title: VM Registration Page
tasks.description: Page /dashboard/vms/new. Form to create VM entry. Displays generated API key and install script once.

tasks.title: Agent WS Client
tasks.description: Implement WebSocket client in packages/agent using `ws`. Connects to wss://api.yourdomain.com/agent?key=... with auto-reconnect.

tasks.title: Host Metrics Collection
tasks.description: Collect CPU, RAM, Disk usage using Node.js `os` and `fs` modules. Run every 30s.

tasks.title: Docker Metrics Collection
tasks.description: Parse output of `docker stats --no-stream --format ...` to get container CPU and memory usage.

tasks.title: Heartbeat Loop
tasks.description: Send `type: 'heartbeat'` message every 30s. Include status, dockerStatus, canvasVersion, uptime.

tasks.title: OOM Detection
tasks.description: Check `dmesg` or `/var/log/kern.log` for OOM killer events targeting node/docker. Send `type: 'alert'` if found.

tasks.title: Command Executor
tasks.description: Handle incoming `type: 'exec'` messages. Run command via `child_process.spawn`. Stream stdout/stderr back as `type: 'output'` chunks.

tasks.title: Installation Script
tasks.description: Create `install-agent.sh` that installs Node.js (if missing), writes agent.env, creates systemd service, starts agent.

tasks.title: API Deployment Script
tasks.description: Create deploy script for API VM: install Node.js, Postgres, Caddy, clone repo, run migrations, start with PM2.

tasks.title: Caddy Production Config
tasks.description: Write Caddyfile for production: reverse proxy to localhost:3001, automatic TLS, security headers.

tasks.title: UI Deploy Script (Netlify)
tasks.description: Script to build apps/web and deploy to Netlify via CLI. Set environment variables.

tasks.title: E2E Test: Agent Connection
tasks.description: Manual or scripted test: Run agent locally (or in Docker). Verify it appears as 'online' in DB and UI.

tasks.title: E2E Test: Command Flow
tasks.description: Test full flow: UI sends restart command -> API queues -> Agent receives -> Executes -> Streams output -> UI displays result.

tasks.title: E2E Test: OOM Alert
tasks.description: Simulate OOM (e.g. limit container memory). Verify agent sends alert, API stores it, UI shows notification.
